name: appium-mydemoapp
description: Mobile test automation project using Appium + WebdriverIO against the Sauce Labs Demo App on Android and iOS simulators/emulators.

scripts.test: rm -rf allure-results && npm run test:android; npm run test:ios
scripts.report: allure generate allure-results/android allure-results/ios --clean -o allure-report && allure open allure-report
